category_sources: NLnet Labs official project page identifies ldns as DNS software.
source_facts.description says it is a DNS library written in C.
display_name_sources: NLnet Labs official project page and documentation use the name ldns/LDNS.
docs_sources: NLnet Labs official documentation has a dedicated LDNS documentation path.
NLnet Labs official project page is the upstream project page.
repo_sources: NLnet Labs official ldns project page links to Browse GitHub Repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C DNS library.
source_facts.executables lists DNS tools including drill and ldns-* utilities.
